title: Soak Test  - Headset connected, app in the background, phone idle
scenario: Soak test: app remains responsive and leak-free after several hours idle in background with headset connected.
steps: Install and launch the app, pair the headset, then go to the Home Screen.
Put the app in the background and leave the phone idle for multiple hours (ideally overnight).
After several hours, check that the app is still running and responsive.
expected: App remains running and responsive with no memory leaks or crashes after prolonged idle time with headset connected.
